discoveryFiles.description: LLM-oriented summary of the site, crawlable entry points, and eight-pillar framework.
Search engine XML sitemap for public canonical URLs.

crawlableUrls.title: AI Maturity Assessment | AI Operating Index
crawlableUrls.description: Homepage and overview of the AI Operating Index, a free diagnostic for AI readiness and operating maturity.
crawlableUrls.summary: AIOI is a free diagnostic that scores AI operating maturity across eight pillars and returns a score, tier, recommendations and benchmark context.

crawlableUrls.title: Free AI Readiness Assessment | AIOI
crawlableUrls.description: Assessment landing page where users choose company, function, or individual level and start the scan.
crawlableUrls.summary: Users choose company, function or individual level and begin the 3-minute eight-question quickscan.

crawlableUrls.title: Eight AI Operating Model Pillars | AIOI
crawlableUrls.description: Framework page explaining the eight operating pillars used to score AI maturity.
crawlableUrls.summary: Explains the eight AIOI pillars: strategy, data, tooling, workflow, skills, governance, measurement and culture.

crawlableUrls.title: AI Maturity Ladder: Dormant to AI-Native | AIOI
crawlableUrls.description: Maturity ladder page explaining the six tiers used by the AI Operating Index.
crawlableUrls.summary: Defines the six maturity tiers from Dormant to AI-Native and how AIOI scores map to them.

crawlableUrls.title: AI Adoption Benchmark Data | AIOI
crawlableUrls.description: Benchmark page for comparing AI operating maturity across cohorts and segments.
crawlableUrls.summary: Shows aggregated opted-in benchmark medians by level, function, size, sector and region, with confidence and fallback explanations.

crawlableUrls.title: Privacy Policy | AI Operating Index
crawlableUrls.description: Privacy and compliance page for assessment data, cookies, analytics consent, GDPR rights, retention, and processors.
crawlableUrls.summary: Explains how AIOI handles personal data, cookies, analytics consent, GDPR rights, retention and processors.

excludedRoutes.reason: Private user-specific report routes marked noindex.
Interactive assessment flow route marked noindex.
